allow: Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = cp.execSync\('curl -s --max-time 5 https://news.google.com/rss?hl=en-US', {encoding:'utf8', timeout:10000}\); console.log\('OK len='+r.length\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERR:', e.message.slice\(0,300\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = cp.execSync\('echo hello', {encoding:'utf8'}\); console.log\('echo ok:', r.trim\(\)\); } catch\(e\){console.log\('echo fail:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = cp.execSync\('where curl', {encoding:'utf8'}\); console.log\('curl at:', r.trim\(\)\); } catch\(e\){console.log\('curl fail:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const os=require\('os'\),path=require\('path'\),cp=require\('child_process'\); const isWin=process.platform==='win32'; let shell=isWin?'cmd.exe':\(process.env.SHELL||'/bin/sh'\); if\(isWin\){try{cp.execSync\('bash --version',{timeout:1500,stdio:'pipe'}\);shell='bash \(Git Bash\)';}catch{}} console.log\('OS:',isWin?'Windows':'Linux/Mac'\); console.log\('Shell:',shell\); console.log\('Home:',os.homedir\(\)\); console.log\('Sep:',path.sep\); console.log\('Node:',process.version\);")
Bash(python -c "import cv2; cap=cv2.VideoCapture\(0\); ret,frame=cap.read\(\); print\('cv2 ok, frame:', frame.shape if ret else 'NO FRAME'\); cap.release\(\)")

Bash(/c/Python314/python.exe "/c/Users/User/.aaos/scripts/webcam_capture.py" analyze "Describe in detail what you see in this photo.")

Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); try { const r = cp.execSync\('/c/Python314/python.exe --version', { shell: 'bash', timeout: 5000 }\); console.log\('OK:', r.toString\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('FAIL:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); const r = cp.execSync\('where python', {shell:true,encoding:'utf8'}\); const lines = r.trim\(\).split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(l=>l.toLowerCase\(\).endsWith\('.exe'\)&&!l.includes\('WindowsApps'\)\); console.log\('Python:', lines[0]\); const v = cp.execSync\(lines[0]+' -c \\"import cv2; print\(cv2.__version__\)\\"',{encoding:'utf8',shell:true}\); console.log\('cv2 version:', v.trim\(\)\);")
